raw_consumer_statement:
I am a Citi XXXX XXXX credit card holder, and I noticed an unrecognized charge of {$95.00} on XX/XX/. I raised a dispute regarding this charge, and Citi temporarily reversed the transaction. However, on XX/XX/, the charge was re-applied to my card. 

I reside in North Carolina, but the charge was made at XXXX in XXXX, CA. This is clearly a fraudulent transaction that I did not authorize. 

Could you please assist me in resolving this issue and refunding the amount to my card?
